items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend pottery workshop run by the community arts studio. Two days before it starts, the studio emailed to move the session from Saturday morning to a weekday evening, which conflicts with your work schedule.
items.direction: Write an email to the studio coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the new weekday evening time does not work for you
Describe what you had originally planned around the Saturday session
Request an alternative weekend slot or a refund
items.subject: Schedule change for the pottery workshop

items.scenario: You and a friend planned a two-day cycling trip along the coast next month. You just learned the route you chose is closed for repairs, so you want to propose a different lake-loop trail instead and adjust the dates.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Tell your friend that the coastal route is closed for repairs
Describe the lake-loop trail you want to ride instead
Provide two possible weekends that fit your schedule
items.subject: New plan for our cycling trip

items.scenario: You ordered a standing desk online and it arrived last week. The desktop has a deep scratch across one corner, and the height-adjustment motor stops halfway when you raise it. You want the company to fix the problem.
items.direction: Write an email to the customer support manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the scratch and the motor problem with the desk
Explain how the faulty desk has affected your daily work
Request a replacement or a repair at no extra cost
items.subject: Damaged standing desk from my recent order

items.scenario: You live in a student apartment where the shared laundry room has been out of service for over a week. The building posted a notice promising repairs, but nothing has changed, and you are running out of clean clothes.
items.direction: Write an email to the building manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how long the laundry room has been out of service
Describe the difficulty this has caused for residents
Request a firm date when the machines will be repaired
items.subject: Laundry room still out of service
